title: bupleurum aira
intro: Bupleurum aira, also known as Chinese thorowax or hare's ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum aira include reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum aira can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
